feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Disable App Finder in S4HC
entry.content:
Hi SAP,

 

Our requirement is to disable app finder in S4HC Fiori page.

Thanks & Regards. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to resend failed messages in S/4HANA Public Cloud to SAP FSM
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm implementing the integration package - Integration of Service in SAP S/4HANA Cloud with SAP Field Service Management.

I have some failed messages of the integration flow - Replicate Service Order from SAP S4HANA Cloud to SAP Field Service Management because of the data error in SAP FSM. Now the data in FSM has been corrected.

How can I resend these failed messages from S4 to FSM?

Regards,

Minh

entry.title: Why the second ZP document is being created with full invoice amount (but says as bank charges)？
entry.content:
The first ZP document clears the vendor open line item. The debit in the second ZP (bank charges) clears the credit against the first ZP document. However, there is still a credit in the clearing account as an open item.

Could someone please explain the reason for the second ZP document, which includes both a debit and credit for the full amount of the invoice?

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: SAP Public Cloud - 無法copy Purchase Requisition Header Note去Purchase Order Header Text
entry.content:
在SAP Public Cloud上面，當convert PR to PO的時候，客戶想PR的Header Note複製過去PO的Header Text

我找到一個論壇上講standard做不了，但是可以在custom logic app使用BADIs, e.g. Modification of Purchase Order Header.

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/copy-purchase-requisition-header-note-to-purchase-order/qaq-p/12369331

我們technical同事嘗試加logic, 但沒有作用， PR Header Note複製不了去PO Header Text。

請問有沒有什麼建議和用什麼BADIs可以成功加這個logic。謝謝

entry.title: SAP Public Cloud - 如何創建自定义字段，在Email Template上使用
entry.content:
如何創建Z field/Z variable，在Email Template上使用。

Purchase Requisition Approval使用了這個Email Template: YY1_02000458_CRT_ALL

Template裡面有很多variable, 例如: {{TaskName}}, {{TaskStatus}}

請問能否更改varaible的內容，要在哪個地方更改?

另外，可否創建自定义字段，在Email Template上使用？請問在那裡創建？

 

謝謝!

entry.title: Implementation of BADI MM_PUR_S4_RFQ_MODIFY_PRINT_ITM is not called when we print custom output form
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We create an implementation of BADI MM_PUR_S4_RFQ_MODIFY_PRINT_ITM to pass the custom field data to the RFQ custom output form. When we create the output for RFQ, we have custom form printed but the BADI implementation was not called. We have checked through Custom Logic trace as well.

Do we need to perform any additional step to call the BADI implementation.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Extensibility SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: Assign classification characteristics to a Document Info Record (DMS) with API
entry.content:
Hi,

i need to assign the classification characteristics to a DMS document via API.

i tried the "Characteristic Data for Classification" API with POST /A_ClfnCharacteristicForKeyDate('{CharcInternalID}')/to_CharacteristicValue 

and this parameters:

CharcInternalID=905

(it's custom characteristic)


and payload:

{
   "CharcValue": "1000030",
      "DocNumber": "10000000034",
      "DocumentType": "ZA2",
      "DocumentPart": "000",
      "DocumentVersion": "00"
}

 

where 10000000034 is my DMS document and 1000030 is a supplier code, but i receive and error.

how can i create or change characteristics for a dms documents?

entry.title: Restrict the "Release" and "Pay" button in the App "Make Bank transfers"
entry.content:
Hi All,

I need to Restrict the "Release" and "Pay" button in the App "Make Bank transfers" in S/4 Hana Public cloud system. I don't see the restriction type related to this in the catalog.

Please advise me on the possible solution for this.

Regards,

Inchara BK

entry.title: Billing document -PDF Extract
entry.content: We would like to explore if there is a way to mass download invoices PDF format potentially thousand at a time. Currently we do not have an API available for this process. Could you please suggest a suitable approach.

entry.title: Collections Process receivables Open Amount 0.00
entry.content:
Open Amount is 0.00 in the App Process receivables for open collection items.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: GTS Hard Block, follow-up documents created
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community, 

we have an issue. If Credit Memo Requests and Debit Memo Requests get blocked by GTS our users are able to proceed further and create follow up documents.

We made the following configuration:

Can you please support us here?

 

Thank you very much and best regards,

Annika

entry.title: What is the GS1-128 barcode format
entry.content:
Hello, 

 

I'm looking for the barcode format waiting by SAP S/4HANA cloud public edition. This barcode will be used for picking task in the warehouse RF app, and it should contain : product GTIN, batch number and quantities. 

I tried with many barcode formats but it's not working as expected. 

 

 

For example, here are my tests in the "Test RF environment" app : 
 
I tried to confirm a picking task through the RF app : 
  • The product is ID ABS11017. The GTIN of this product is 3760062888707
  • The batch number is LT102024
  • The quantity is 1 unit
So I created the following GS1-128 barcode : ]C10103760062888707]C110LT102024]С1301
Note that I also tested : ]C1010376006288870710LT102024]С1301 ; ]C10103760062888707]C110LT102024#]С1301 ; ]C10103760062888707C110LT102024#С1301 ; ]C1010376006288870710LT102024#301 ; and some others
 
However, whatever the format is, the problem remains always the same : 
  • The system recovers the product ID : GOOD
  • The system does not recover the batch ID : NOT GOOD 
  • The system does not recover the quantities : NOT GOOD
 
So I'd like to know what should be the GS1-128 barcode format in order to fill automatically the product ID + batch + quantities. 
Thanks in advanced for your help. 
 
Best regards
Emmanuel

-----------------------------------------------

Step to reproduce my test : 
  1. Go to "Test RF environment" app and connect
  2. Click on "04-Outbound Process"
  3. Click on "01-Picking"
  4. Click on "04-Picking by WO"
  5. Enter WO number and click on "Enter"
  6. Click on the arrow (>) on the bottom of the screen and click on "Next"
  7. Copy paste the barcode in the "product" cell

entry.title: Translation of costing sheet entry
entry.content:
Dear Community,

we are currently define a costing sheet. Is there any possibility to translate the entries in different language?

Thx Chrisitan

entry.title: Fiori Change Document Reuse Component not found after Deployment in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Dear Community,

We have an interesting problem.

We developed a Fiori app using Business Application Studio (BAS) and integrated the Reuse Component for Change Documents following the provided instructions (How to Use the Fiori Reuse Library for Change Document Solution | SAP Help Portal)

The app runs perfectly in BAS. However, after deploying it to the Public Cloud (as per the tutorial Create a SAP Fiori App and Deploy it to SAP S/4HANA Cloud, ABAP Environment | SAP Tutorials), the app starts but fails as soon as a selection is triggered, showing the error: "

Errorfailed to load 'sap/nw/core/changedocs/lib/reuse/changedocscomponent/Component.js' from https://ui5.sap.com/1.130.8/resources/sap/nw/core/changedocs/lib/reuse/changedocscomponent/Component.js: script load error"

What are we missing?

We also noticed that in BAS, the .js files are accessed locally, whereas in the Public Cloud, they seem to be fetched directly from the internet. Could this be related to our issue?

BAS:

Deployed in Public Cloud:

Any insights or suggestions would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you!

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 

SAPUI5 

SAP Fiori 

@kaidehmann -> Danke!

entry.title: Is there a way to generate a requote only with the added item?
entry.content:
Dear all

Under SAP S/4 Hana cloud Public, service quotation, there is a way to requote it. But doing that, the quotation is sent and redone with the complete item and not only with the additional item.

Is there a way or a different process to have a "subsequent" quotation linked to the first one with only the added item?

Thank you

Ingrid

entry.title: Does hard currency supported in S4HANA public cloud?
entry.content:
Hi,

We are looking to setup hard currency type in S4HANA public cloud system.

Please help us in confirming whether it is supported or not.

Thanks & regards,

RP

entry.title: Order is blocked by GTS, Invoice possible
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community, 

If a Sales Order is blocked by GTS the Invoice for Service Items can be created.

Is there a specific configuration which prevents this? We can only prevent the Outbound Delivery creation.

Thank you very much and best regards,

Annika

entry.title: API to update mass fields value for mass roles
entry.content:
We would like to know if there is an existing API that allows for updating the values of multiple fields for multiple roles. If such an API does not exist, what is the process to request the creation of a new API for this purpose?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to display account descriptions for fixed assets when printing in the Accounts Document Output
entry.content:
How can the "Details" column display account descriptions instead of just the fixed asset numbers for fixed asset original value and accumulated depreciation accounts when printing?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: #CoE #DH01 how to know which Fiori app is used by which userid.
entry.content: SAP provides Display Security Audit Log app but it only shows transaction codes in the app in s4hana public cloud. It is very inappropreate from viewpoint of system audit because user use not . ransaction codes but Fiori application Is there any way to know  which Fiori app is used by which userid?
